## Meeting Purpose

[Review client progress and refine the Dream 100 outreach strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Zadon Client Secured:** Closed a $4k/mo deal for Zadon's "Game Plan" program by accepting a lower price to secure the client, deferring a rev-share negotiation until performance data is available.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Value-Driven Fulfillment:** Delivered significant value by overhauling the Skool community (adding weekly calls, new modules) and creating a custom Notion OS for members, increasing membership from \~390 to 415.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**Outreach Strategy:** The Dream 100 strategy is effective but slow (1 GammaDoc/2 days). The goal is to increase volume to 1/day by optimizing the landing page creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**Expert Guidance:** Kasey recommended consulting CA coaches Jeremy (rev-share) and David Jacobs (sales) to structure the Zadon deal and improve outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Topics

### Zadon Client Win & Deal Structure

  - [**Deal:** Secured a $4k/mo retainer (ends Jan 20) after the client objected to the initial $5.7k price.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Rev-Share:** The client requested a rev-share model to incentivize a "growth partner" mindset.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [**Decision:** Postponed negotiating a percentage until performance data is available.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Expert Advice:** Kasey recommended consulting CA coaches for guidance:](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Jeremy (Growth Partner Calls):** For rev-share structuring, pros/cons, and pitfalls.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**David Jacobs (Sales Q\&A):** For sales framing and handling objections.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Zadon Fulfillment & Value Creation

  - [**Skool Community Overhaul:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Problem:** The community was disorganized, with random modules and no video descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [**Solution:** Revamped the entire structure, added descriptions to all videos (using AI), and created a new "Start Here" module.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [**Result:** Increased membership from \~390 to 415.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**New Value-Adds:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Weekly Calls:** Added weekly coaching calls with three different coaches to the calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Notion OS:** Built a custom Notion operating system for members to track goals, habits, and macros.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [**Upsell:** Launched a $17 upsell for "Remote Income Modules," which has already generated sales.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [**Email Marketing:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Performance:** A story-based email subject line ("I was 13 crying in the car, then my dad did this") achieved an 81% open rate.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [**Automation:** Implemented an abandoned cart sequence that recovered a sale.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Dream 100 Outreach Strategy

  - [**Process:** The team creates custom "GammaDocs" (landers with VSLs) for high-value prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
  - [**Effectiveness:** The strategy works, but the manual GoHighLevel build process is a bottleneck, limiting volume to 1 GammaDoc every 2 days.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase outreach volume to 1 GammaDoc per day.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Research AI landing page builders (V0, Lovable) to speed up creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2567.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Integrating AI-generated code into GoHighLevel remains an open question.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
  - [**Decision:** Continue the current manual process for 10 total GammaDocs to maintain quality and momentum before exploring AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/ZNCH2xRPyouBSsBzomBPMDzaT5mf_y4y?tab=summary&timestamp=2956.0)
